task_updates.executor_notes: Added an integration test in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx` for a multi-clip drop onto a new bottom track. The test drives pointerdown/move/up with `isNewTrack: true` and verifies `applyEdit` receives `type: 'config'` plus a resolved config containing the new track and moved clips. I also inspected `useClipDrag.ts` to confirm the single-clip new-track branch at lines 365-377 remains untouched and the existing-track multi-drag rows path still lives in the fallback at lines 419-440. Final verification passed with the full video-editor regression suite.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed by the final full regression run that all existing video-editor tests passed after the change set: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` completed with 24 passed test files and 89 passed tests, including the single-clip drag path, same-track multi-drag, cross-track multi-drag to existing tracks, and the new multi-clip new-track integration case.
